rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PHILLIP ELLUL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 7. Philip Ellul's Motion for relief from forfeiture due to hardship. Off Calendar. Mr. Ellul was granted reasonable accomodation, and motion is taken off calendar by moving party. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC VS. ROOSEVELT JOHNSON JR et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 4. Defendant Roosevelt Johnson's Grant Motion for summary judgment. Subject to opposition. Defendant shifted burden showing he is a tenant & entitled to: 1) Notice greater than 3 days per CCP 1161a and, 2) Protections of San Francisco Rent Ordinance. Prevailing party to prepare order. Prepare order per CCP 437c(g). (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY JONES VS. JONATHAN ROSEN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 1. Defendant Jonathan Rosen, Jeremy Herzog and Jennifer Jantz' demurrer to 1st amended complaint. Overruled. 5 days to answer. Demurrer not to test veracity of allegation. Prevailing party to prepare order. Plaintiff to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B in the future. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NA VS. MISCHA EISNER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 2. Defendant Mischa Eisner's demurrer to complaint. Overruled 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficient Re 1161a cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare order. Defense counsel to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B in future and should proofread pleadings re typos & missing words. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLD COURT LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. BREENDA PARKS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 5. Defendant Brenda Parks' Motion to Set aside default/Default Judgment/Leave to Defend. Grant setting aside default and default judgment. Defendant shall remit forthwith one month rent to plaintiff through counsel and file and answer forthwith. Attorneys fees to plaintiff's counsel recoverable at resolution of matter. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 6. Defendant Lorraine Mirabelli's Motion to set aside default and default judgment. Deny. 1) Failed to comply with CCP 473(b) re proposed pleading and, 2) Provides no competent supportive evidence. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ADAM GOLDMAN, TRUSTEE UNDER THE ARNOLD VS. JOHN BORIACK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2011, line 3. Defendant John Boriack, Alexander Rincon and David McAdams' demurrer to complaint. Overruled 5 days to answer. 1) 60 days expires after service; 2) Allegation sufficient to show compliance with San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9(a)(6). Defense counsel to comply with SFLR 2.6C in the future. (501/REQ)
